meta.title: SBOM... Who Pays For It?
meta.description: In this S4x20 clip, Allen Friedman leads a discussion with an ICS asset owner, Kaleem Khawaja of BP, and an ICS vendor, David Foose of Emerson, on who would do what and who would pay for maintaining a SBOM on an ICS.
